title: Deep Research
summary: description: Multi-source deep research using firecrawl and exa MCPs. Searches the web, synthesizes findings, and delivers cited reports with source attribution. Use when the user wants thorough research on any topic with evidence and citations.

claims.text: description: Multi-source deep research using firecrawl and exa MCPs.
Searches the web, synthesizes findings, and delivers cited reports with source attribution.
Use when the user wants thorough research on any topic with evidence and citations.
# Deep Research Produce thorough, cited research reports from multiple web sources using firecrawl and exa MCP tools.
